title: Offline-first apps: 80% uptime in spotty networks
meta_description: Cut loan submission failures 32% with offline-first SQLite + WorkManager — Android 13, SQLCipher 4.5.6, and client-side image resizing in 1.2s on Tecno Spark 8C.
prewritten_tweet:
Most offline-first apps fail because they assume connectivity is binary.

Real users: spotty 2G, metered data, dead batteries.
